text.title: Product Trio Rituals Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping session state to a rule.

decision-tree.root-question: All three roles (PM + design + eng) present?

conclusion.verdict: cancel session; reschedule when full trio available

branch.question: Does every agenda item have a desired outcome?

conclusion.verdict: add desired outcome per item before running
park overruns; reschedule into next session

branch.question: Were decisions logged with rationale + follow-up owner?
Was last week's outcome review run?

conclusion.verdict: run last-week outcome review before publication

text.example: trio_complete=true, outcome_missing=false, timebox_violation=false, decision_log_incomplete=false, review_missing=false → accept session.
